target.name: run-tasks
target.description: Master target that calls other targets in order.

echo.message: ... Begining Step 1 - Kickoff Country Specific Data Scripts for Country:${xstp.dtv.location.CountryId}
... install.type=${install.type}
WARNING:File xstore.properties is not found in the the xstore backup folder.
Updated property @{prop} from xstore backup to xstore updates xstore.properties
Copying data for country COUNTRY_${xstp.dtv.location.CountryId} to download directory.
Deleting country specific data.
Production environment selected. Deleting test data.
Found download files. The dataloader will be invoked.
No download files were provided. The dataloader will not be invoked.
Copying data for country ${xstp.dtv.location.RegionId} to download directory.
Deleting region specific data.
Production environment selected. Deleting test data.
Found download files. The dataloader will be invoked.
No download files were provided. The dataloader will not be invoked.
... Begining Step 2 - Populate Xstore Database With Country Specific Data Scripts for Country:${xstp.dtv.location.CountryId}
... the user has also elected to install TEST data.
... Begining Step 3 - Populate Xstore Database With Country Specific Test Data Update Scripts for Country:${xstp.dtv.location.CountryId}
... this is a PROD environment. Test data scripts will not be run.
... Begining Step 2 - Populate Xstore Database With Country Specific Data Update Scripts for Country:${xstp.dtv.location.CountryId}

target.name: update-xstore-eftlink-prop
target.description: updating eft link prop if exist

target.name: update-xmobile-eftlink-prop
target.description: updating xmobile eft link prop if exist

echo.message: Keystore password configured in xstore-mobile/xstore.properties file is correct hence not updating properties

propertyfile.comment: Updating keystore password properties file for mobile

target.name: lev-xmobile-update-TSE-properties
target.description: Update TSE properties and set to blank for mobile

echo.message: For Xmobile, TSE start date is already set to blank hence not updating countrypack.de.tseStartDate property

target.name: lev-update-truststore
target.description: Update lev truststore file if provided

target.name: lev-update-tpgjavapos-jar
target.description: Update tpgjavapos jar file for CN

echo.message: Deploying tpgjavapos-3.0.jar file for Xstore from ${install.dir}/lib/ext/hpprinter/cnh300c/tpgjavapos-3.0.jar to ${install.dir}/lib/patch/tpgjavapos-3.0.jar
